question: I'm researching a state that was below the reported median on both the measure for staying on prescribed antidepressant treatment and the measure for receiving follow-up mental health care after a hospitalization for mental illness in the 2015 behavioral health quality measures, and also had at least 500 drug-poisoning deaths in 2016 together with an age-adjusted drug-poisoning death rate of at least 25 per 100,000 residents for both sexes and all ages combined. Which state is it? Respond with [Answer]. After finding that, what is the highest point in that state? Your response should be in the format [Answer].

1.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/2015-child-and-adult-health-care-quality-measures-08da6/files/2015-child-and-adult-health-care-quality-measures.7kj7-m9ih.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

filtered = df[
    (df["Domain"] == "Behavioral Health Care")
    & (df["Measure Name"].isin([
        "Antidepressant Medication Management",
        "Follow-Up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness",
    ]))
    & (df["State"] != "United States")
].copy()

filtered["State Rate"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["State Rate"], errors="coerce")
filtered["Median"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["Median"], errors="coerce")
filtered = filtered.dropna(subset=["State Rate", "Median"])
filtered["below_median"] = filtered["State Rate"] < filtered["Median"]

amm_states = set(
    filtered[
        (filtered["Measure Name"] == "Antidepressant Medication Management")
        & (filtered["below_median"])
    ]["State"]
)
fuh_states = set(
    filtered[
        (filtered["Measure Name"] == "Follow-Up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness")
        & (filtered["below_median"])
    ]["State"]
)

answer = sorted(amm_states & fuh_states)
1.subquestion: Which states were below the reported median on both the measure for staying on prescribed antidepressant treatment and the measure for receiving follow-up mental health care after a hospitalization for mental illness in the 2015 behavioral health quality measures?

2.fact:
import io
import pandas as pd
import boto3
from botocore import UNSIGNED
from botocore.config import Config

source = "datagov/nchs-drug-poisoning-mortality-by-state-united-states-07d29/files/rows.txt"
bucket = "lakeqa-yc4103-datalake"
obj = boto3.client("s3", config=Config(signature_version=UNSIGNED)).get_object(Bucket=bucket, Key=source)
df = pd.read_csv(io.BytesIO(obj["Body"].read()), low_memory=False)

filtered = df[
    (df["Year"] == 2016)
    & (df["Sex"] == "Both Sexes")
    & (df["Age Group"] == "All Ages")
    & (df["Race and Hispanic Origin"] == "All Races-All Origins")
    & (df["State"] != "United States")
].copy()

filtered["Age-adjusted Rate"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["Age-adjusted Rate"], errors="coerce")
filtered["Deaths"] = pd.to_numeric(filtered["Deaths"], errors="coerce")
filtered = filtered.dropna(subset=["Age-adjusted Rate", "Deaths"])

answer = sorted(
    filtered[
        (filtered["Age-adjusted Rate"] >= 25)
        & (filtered["Deaths"] >= 500)
    ]["State"].tolist()
)
2.subquestion: Which states had at least 500 drug-poisoning deaths in 2016 together with an age-adjusted drug-poisoning death rate of at least 25 per 100,000 residents for both sexes and all ages combined?

3.fact: The highest point is Wheeler Peak at over in the Sangre de Cristo Mountains, while the lowest is the Red Bluff Reservoir at around , in the southeastern corner of the state.
3.subquestion: What is the highest point in <hop 1 answer>?

reasoning: Node 1: Filter rows where `Domain` = `Behavioral Health Care` and `Measure Name` is either `Antidepressant Medication Management` or `Follow-Up After Hospitalization for Mental Illness`, exclude `State` = `United States`, convert `State Rate` and `Median` to numeric, and keep states having at least one below-median row for each measure family.

Node 2: Filter rows where `Year` = 2016, `Sex` = `Both Sexes`, `Age Group` = `All Ages`, `Race and Hispanic Origin` = `All Races-All Origins`, and `State` != `United States`, convert `Age-adjusted Rate` and `Deaths` to numeric, and keep states where age-adjusted rate is at least 25 and deaths are at least 500.
Hop result: semantic intersection of <node 1 answer> and <node 2 answer> = New Mexico.
Node 3: Wheeler Peak is the highest point in <hop 1 answer>.
